name: The Five Minute Killer Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Gather all ingredients and prepare the buttered pan before starting.
2. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine milk, sugar, and salt.
3. Bring mixture to a boil and cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring constantly (start timing when the mixture begins to bubble around the corners of the pan).
4. Remove from heat. Add marshmallows, chocolate chips, nuts, and vanilla extract.
5. Stir vigorously for 1 minute (or until marshmallows are completely melted and blended).
6. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan. Allow to cool until it doesn't fall out or slosh around in the pan.
7. Eat!
